settings.description: Every piece of tech is also a work of art. This handcrafted display showcases the intricate beauty of iPhone technology, perfectly preserved in crystal-clear resin with subtle LED illumination.

settings.hero_heading: A Digital Exhibit of the iPhone 4 Legacy
settings.hero_text: A century from now, when historians trace the arc of human progress, they'll point to devices that changed everything. This is one of them. Preserved. Celebrated. Eternal.
settings.ch1_text_1: In his quest to precision and premium materials, Steve Jobs didn't just create a phone. He created the device that would redefine the form, inspiring art in his intended design for decades.
settings.ch1_text_2: The iPhone 4 revolutionized the world with its refined beauty and its innovative design. Every component tells a story of revolutionary innovation, now carefully revealed for the world to see.
settings.ch2_text_1: Meticulously showcasing the intricate engineering. Every component tells a story of revolutionary innovation, now carefully revealed for eternity to cherish.
settings.ch2_text_2: What was hidden beneath glass and aluminum now stands revealed— the A4 processor, the Retina display controller, the revolutionary camera sensor. Each component preserved in crystal-clear resin, suspended in time like specimens in a museum of innovation.
settings.ch3_text: Our dedicated artisans painstakingly disassemble, clean, and meticulously position every component within a single, awe-inspiring display. It's not just preservation. It's through a piece of modern history—a tribute to what happens when technology meets art.

settings.label: The Philosophy
settings.heading: Technology alone is not enough.
settings.subtext: It's technology married with the liberal arts, married with the humanities, that yields the results that make our hearts sing.
settings.attribution: — The ethos that defined a generation

pillars.title: Innovation
pillars.text: Every detail of the iPhone 4 was obsessed over. Now, those details live forever in resin and light.

pillars.title: Craftsmanship
pillars.text: Each piece is assembled by hand with the same precision Jobs demanded in every product.

pillars.title: Legacy
pillars.text: More than a device. It's a monument to the moment technology became something beautiful.

settings.quote: Design is not just what it looks like and feels like. Design is how it works.
settings.quote_subtext: This piece doesn't just celebrate how the iPhone looked. It celebrates how it changed everything.
settings.final_text: Own a piece of history. Own a work of art.

settings.description: Every piece tells a story of innovation. We carefully disassemble iconic devices, preserving each component before suspending them in crystal-clear resin. The result is a stunning display that transforms technology into timeless art.

steps.title: Precision Disassembly
steps.text: Each device is carefully taken apart to preserve the integrity of every component

steps.title: Artistic Arrangement
steps.text: Components are meticulously positioned to create a visually striking composition

steps.title: Resin Encapsulation
steps.text: High-clarity resin seals and protects, creating a museum-quality display piece

blocks.name: Michael Chen
blocks.comment: Absolutely stunning piece! The craftsmanship is incredible and it looks even better in person. Perfect conversation starter for my office.

blocks.name: Sarah Johnson
blocks.comment: As a tech enthusiast, this is the perfect blend of nostalgia and art. The LED lighting really makes it pop. Highly recommend!

blocks.name: David Martinez
blocks.comment: The attention to detail is remarkable. Shipped quickly and arrived perfectly packaged. Worth every penny!

blocks.name: Emma Williams
blocks.comment: Beautiful craftsmanship! This is more than just decor - it's a piece of history preserved in resin. Love it!

blocks.question: What materials are in the bundle?
blocks.answer: Each piece is crafted using genuine device components, premium optical-grade resin, and includes an LED lighting system with a custom wooden base.

blocks.question: Is the lamp dimmable?
blocks.answer: Yes! All our pieces feature integrated dimmable LED lighting, allowing you to adjust the brightness to your preference.

blocks.question: How do I care for and maintain my art piece?
blocks.answer: Simply dust with a soft, dry cloth. Avoid harsh chemicals or abrasive materials. The resin is UV-resistant and designed for long-lasting clarity.

blocks.question: What devices did you disassemble and include in the art?
blocks.answer: This piece features authentic iPhone components including the logic board, camera module, display assembly, and various internal components - all genuine parts.

blocks.question: Do you offer international shipping?
blocks.answer: Yes, we ship worldwide with secure packaging. International shipping rates are calculated at checkout based on your location.
